'''âr-p-m-v''' ('''karapmevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:annalise|annalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:annalise|annalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-p-m-v
|-
! Lemma
| karapmevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirapmevoko|thirapmevoko]] || [[word:jirapmevoko|jirapmevoko]] || [[word:shirapmevoko|shirapmevoko]] || [[word:kirapmevoko|kirapmevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurapmevoko|thuthurapmevoko]] || [[word:jujurapmevoko|jujurapmevoko]] || [[word:shushurapmevoko|shushurapmevoko]] || [[word:kukurapmevoko|kukurapmevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurapmevoko|thurapmevoko]] || [[word:jurapmevoko|jurapmevoko]] || [[word:shurapmevoko|shurapmevoko]] || [[word:kurapmevoko|kurapmevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurapmevoko|thurapmevoko]] || [[word:jurapmevoko|jurapmevoko]] || [[word:shurapmevoko|shurapmevoko]] || [[word:kurapmevoko|kurapmevoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorapmevoko|thothorapmevoko]] || [[word:jojorapmevoko|jojorapmevoko]] || [[word:shoshorapmevoko|shoshorapmevoko]] || [[word:kokorapmevoko|kokorapmevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorapmevoko|thorapmevoko]] || [[word:jorapmevoko|jorapmevoko]] || [[word:shorapmevoko|shorapmevoko]] || [[word:korapmevoko|korapmevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorapmevoko|thorapmevoko]] || [[word:jorapmevoko|jorapmevoko]] || [[word:shorapmevoko|shorapmevoko]] || [[word:korapmevoko|korapmevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrapmevoko|thĂŠrapmevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠrapmevoko|jĂŠrapmevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠrapmevoko|shĂŠrapmevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠrapmevoko|kĂŠrapmevoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharapmevoko|tharapmevoko]] || [[word:jarapmevoko|jarapmevoko]] || [[word:sharapmevoko|sharapmevoko]] || [[word:karapmevoko|karapmevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
